title: Sunshine on a Ranney Day Renovators Share Kindness Renovating Hospitals and Homes
excerpt: Peter and Holly Ranney were featured on NBC's Today Show for their renovation of the parent sleep rooms at Children's Healthcare of Atlanta, transforming hospital spaces into calming retreats for families of sick children.
featuredHeadline: Renovating hospital sleep rooms for families of sick children.
featuredDescription: Peter & Holly Ranney were featured on NBC's Today Show as part of the #ShareKindness campaign for their renovation of parent sleep rooms at Children's Healthcare of Atlanta — transforming hospital spaces into calming retreats.
